updateNote: Day 40 PM refresh: Iran violated ceasefire with missile barrage minutes after announcement, then Khamenei ordered compliance. Ceasefire holding by morning. Netanyahu: Lebanon excluded from ceasefire. Oil crashed 16% then stabilized at Brent $95.80, WTI $97.28. Physical dated Brent hit record $144.42. Gas $4.14. Hezbollah 24 attack waves on northern Israel. Pope Leo condemned Trump threat. Journalist Kittleson freed from Iraq. World reactions: Guterres, Egypt, Oman welcome; UAE rejects. Hormuz Day 37 — conditional reopening.
